sections.paragraph: to dream, to talk in one’s dreams, Isa 56:10. Kindred is חָזָה, and the original idea is that of nocturnal vision. LXX. ἐνυπνιαζόμενοι. Aqu. φανταζόμενοι. Symm. ὁραματισταί. (Arab. هذى and هذا to talk ramblingly, to be delirious, especially through illness, and so commonly amongst the Talmudists.)
